title: Last Day Where You Can Still Cross
description: Cells flood in the given 1-indexed order; return the latest zero-indexed day when a 4-neighbor land path crosses from top to bottom. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: row: int, col: int, cells: list[list[int]]. 1 <= row,col and row*col <= 20000; cells is a permutation of all 1-indexed cells; input may be inspected but need not be preserved.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
